LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS IRA SERVICES, INC., AND FORGE GLOBAL INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND DISMISS OR STAY THE PROCEEDINGS PENDING THE OUTCOME OF THE ARBITRATION: ON MARCH 5, 2021, I ORDERED DEFENDANTS TO "PRODUCE ALL DOCUMENTS RESPONSIVE TO" PLAINTIFF'S "REQUESTS 1, 3, 4, 9, 10, 36, 68 AND 69." DEFENDANTS SAY THEY HAVE COMPLIED. PLAINTIFF SAYS THEY HAVE NOT AND RATHER "CONTINUE TO STONEWALLING[SIC] DISCOVERY DIRECTLY RELATED TO ARBITRATION AGREEMENTS BETWEEN THE PARTIES." PLAINTIFF IS HEREBY AUTHORIZED TO FILE A DISCOVERY MOTION IN THE DISCOVERY DEPARTMENT (301) ON THIS TOPIC. ALL OTHER ACTIVITY IN THIS CASE IS STAYED UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE. JUDGE: RICHARD ULMER, CLERK: S. LE, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/RBU)

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAR-05-2021 HEARING RE DEFENDANTS IRA SERVICES, INC. AND FORGE GLOBAL INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND DISMISS OR STAY THE PROCEEDINGS PENDING THE OUTCOME OF THE ARBITRATION, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE COURT'S JANUARY 22, 2021 ORDER HAS NOT BEEN COMPLIED WITH. ON OR BEFORE MARCH 15, 2021, DEFENDANTS SHALL PRODUCE ALL DOCUMENTS RESPONSIVE TO REQUESTS 1, 3, 4, 9, 10, 36, 68 AND 69. NO OTHER DOCUMENTS NEED BE PRODUCED AT THIS TIME. ON OR BEFORE MARCH 19, 2021, THE PARTIES ARE TO FILE AND SERVE FIVE-PAGE SUPPLEMENT BRIEFS REGARDING DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. HEARING ON DEFENDANTS' MOTION IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 2, 2021. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/RBU)MARGARET L. WATSON

Defendants Forge Global Inc And Ira Services Inc Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss Or Stay The Proceedings Pending The Outcome Of The Arbitration
Off Calendar Apr-02-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS IRA SERVICES, INC., and FORGE GLOBAL INC.'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss Or Stay The Proceedings Pending The Outcome Of The Arbitration:

On March 5, 2021, I ordered defendants to "produce all documents responsive to" plaintiff's "requests 1, 3, 4, 9, 10, 36, 68 and 69." Defendants say they have complied. Plaintiff says they have not and rather "continue to stonewalling[sic] discovery directly related to arbitration agreements between the parties." Plaintiff is hereby authorized to file a discovery motion in the discovery department (301) on this topic. All other activity in this case is stayed until further notice.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

Defendants Forge Global Inc And Ira Services Inc Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss Or Stay The Proceedings Pending The Outcome Of The Arbitration
Off Calendar Mar-05-2021 Continued To Apr-02-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JOE ALIOTO VERONESE, Esq. of Law Offices of Joseph L. Alioto and Angela Alioto (Tel: 415-434-8700) for plaintiff Leslie Guerin;
Atty. GABRIEL N. RUBIN, Esq. of Jackson Lewis P.C. (Tel: 415-394-9400) for defendants Forge Global, Inc. and Forge Trust. Co. (formerly known as IRA Services, Inc.).

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS IRA SERVICES, INC. AND FORGE GLOBAL INC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss Or Stay The Proceedings Pending The Outcome Of The Arbitration.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The court's January 22, 2021 order has not been complied with. On or before March 15, 2021, defendants shall produce all documents responsive to requests 1, 3, 4, 9, 10, 36, 68 and 69. No other documents need be produced at this time. On or before March 19, 2021, the parties are to file and serve five-page supplement briefs regarding defendants' motion to compel arbitration. Hearing on defendants' motion is continued to April 2, 2021.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

DEFENDANTs IRA SERVICES, INC. and FORGE GLOBAL INC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss Or Stay The Proceedings Pending The Outcome Of The Arbitration is continued to March 5, 2021 to enable completion of arbitration-related discovery.
